title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS backed by $85M+ and trusted by brands like The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine. Reports to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops/Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce expertise, and the ability to work with the Tel Aviv HQ across time zones. A strategic leader-doer who builds dashboards, flows, and data models.
score_reason: Exceptional match—15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps exceeds 7+ requirement, fintech focus aligns perfectly, deep Salesforce expertise confirmed, and proven ability to scale GTM operations at high-growth companies. Tel Aviv HQ location is in target geography with global remote capability.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's impressive $85M+ raise and your expansion across enterprise brands like The New York Times and Wiz—exactly the scaling trajectory that matches your RevOps playbook. With 15+ years building GTM operational infrastructure in B2B SaaS, including fintech, you've likely faced the same cloud cost complexity challenges your customers solve for. I think there's a compelling conversation about bringing your Salesforce mastery and pipeline forecasting experience to lead Finout's revenue engine as it scales beyond the next inflection point.

title: Head of Revenue Operations

Your GTM is at that inflection point where RevOps infrastructure directly unlocks growth, and I've built playbooks for exactly this motion—pipeline predictability, GTM team alignment, and metrics that actually drive decisions.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations

Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS GTM models, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools like Tableau/Retool), and CRM proficiency. Salary range $149K–$175K USD.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS GTM mastery, and Salesforce proficiency. Territory strategy, pipeline forecasting, and data-driven segmentation are core competencies that directly match this high-impact role at a market leader.

Your focus on redesigning territory composition and whitespace analysis aligns perfectly with work I've done optimizing sales segmentation and forecasting accuracy through Salesforce and advanced analytics.
